pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; upgrading to 2.6.x is required to compile and run on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target JDK 17 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the new Spring Boot version.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Disable the deprecated OpenEntityManagerInViewFilter to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Java 17 standards.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: The property 'spring.jpa.open-in-view' defaults to false in newer Spring Boot versions, and the old default (true) is deprecated and removed in Spring Boot 3, causing configuration errors or runtime warnings.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Set the path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to avoid deprecation warnings and errors in Spring Framework 6.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Framework 6 (used in Spring Boot 3/Java 17) removed PathPatternParser as the default and deprecated the old AntPathMatcher behavior; explicit configuration is required to prevent startup failures or unexpected routing behavior.
